description: The Shumlak mode family and atlas m=1 theorem can be read as two halves of a joint stability story.

open_questions.question: Can a ZaP or FuZE-class device realize a profile satisfying both Shumlak m=0 shear and Atlas m=1 H3 conditions?

suggested_next_steps.description: Design a ZaP/FuZE-class discharge target that satisfies Shumlak's m=0 shear threshold and approximates Atlas H3 conditions.
suggested_next_steps.title: Joint m=0/m=1 profile target

suggested_next_steps.description: Run a shared equilibrium through both m=0 shear-stabilization analysis and m=1 Atlas-style spectral analysis.
suggested_next_steps.title: Common-profile stability check

suggested_next_steps.description: Derive whether satisfying the m=0 and m=1 conditions simultaneously creates new higher-m or mixed-mode constraints.
suggested_next_steps.title: Mode-family coupling

scope.regime: The Shumlak mode family and atlas m=1 theorem can be read as two halves of a joint stability story.

title: Shumlak's m=0 sheared-flow stabilization is complementary rather than competing
